steps.title: Identify the relationship (Pythagoras / SOH-CAH-TOA)
steps.content:
From angle $x^{\circ}$, the opposite side is $63$ and the hypotenuse is $73$. Apply SOH:
$$\sin(x^{\circ}) = \frac{\text{opposite}}{\text{hypotenuse}}$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches the correct answer, $\frac{63}{73}$, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore C is correct.
